steps.expression: async () => { const getEditor = async () => window.api.councils.getEditorView({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', councilId: null }); const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; let editor = await getEditor(); if (!editor.ok) { return false; } let attempts = 0; while (editor.value.availableAgents.length < 2 && attempts < 4) { attempts += 1; const agentSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Transcript Member ${Date.now()}-${attempts}`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper agent.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!agentSave.ok) { break; } editor = await getEditor(); if (!editor.ok) { return false; } } if (editor.value.availableAgents.length < 2) { return false; } const selectedMembers = editor.value.availableAgents.slice(0, 2); const saveResult = await window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `Transcript Scenario ${Date.now()}`, topic: 'Validate transcript shell behavior', goal: 'Validate transcript empty-state and affordances', mode: 'manual', tags: ['scenario', 'transcript'], memberAgentIds: selectedMembers.map((agent) => agent.id), memberColorsByAgentId: { [selectedMembers[0].id]: '#0f766e', [selectedMembers[1].id]: '#be123c' }, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); return saveResult.ok; }

steps.text: No messages yet. Choose the next speaker from Members.

steps.expression: () => { const transcriptSection = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.council-view-left-column .settings-section')).find((section) => section.querySelector('h2')?.textContent?.trim() === 'Transcript'); if (!(transcriptSection instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } return Array.from(transcriptSection.querySelectorAll('button')).every((button) => button.textContent?.trim() !== 'Start'); }
